name: WazuhDisableAccount
author: ATTENSE
description: Disable a compromised user account on the monitored host using Wazuh's built-in disable-account active response.

configurationItems.name: wazuh_url
configurationItems.description: Base URL of the Wazuh manager API

configurationItems.name: agent_name
configurationItems.description: Wazuh-registered agent name the account lives on (a username observable has no host/IP to resolve from, so this is the primary lookup)
